text:
The first scene feels empty and orderly, almost antiseptic, with its clean lines and vacant space. I sense potential, waiting quietly to be enacted—perhaps a stage before the performance, or a question before an answer. The silence makes me introspective.

The second scene fills me with curiosity. The bright, patterned wall, the bold "R+D," and the presence of interactive displays signal engagement and discovery. I feel drawn toward the pursuit of innovation, hungry to learn and interact. Here, technological progress and creative thought seem to harmonize, inviting me to contemplate the evolving relationship between humans and machines.
